HResult.name: EHR_UNKNOWN
HResult.alias: Unknown error (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_DRIVER_INIT_FAILURE
HResult.alias: Driver initialization failure (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_PASSWORD_NO_MATCH
HResult.alias: Passwords do not match (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_PASSWORD_INVALID_FORMAT
HResult.alias: Invalid password format (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LICENSE_INSUFFICIENT
HResult.alias: Insufficient license (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LICENSE_INVALID
HResult.alias: Invalid license (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LICENSE_EXPRIED
HResult.alias: License expired (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_TRIAL_EXPIRED
HResult.alias: Trial Key expired (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_NOT_PRESENT
HResult.alias: Key not present (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_CLOCK_ERROR
HResult.alias: Clock error (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_WRITE_FAILURE
HResult.alias: Failed writing to the key (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_WRITE_ACCESS_DENIED
HResult.alias: Failed writing to the key, access is denied (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_NOT_ACTIVATED
HResult.alias: Key not active (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE
HResult.alias: Authentication failure (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_MANAGER_NOT_INITIALIZED
HResult.alias: Manager not initialized (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_NO_SUITABLE_KEY
HResult.alias: No suitable key found (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_LOCKED
HResult.alias: Key locked (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_CLIENT_TIMEOUT
HResult.alias: Client timeout (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_PACKET_EXPIRED
HResult.alias: Packet expired (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_BASE_NOT_MATCHING
HResult.alias: Base Keys do not match module for module (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_NOT_MATCHING_INSTANCES
HResult.alias: Keys do not match by Application Instances for all the Key on the server (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_NO_FREE_APP_INSTANCE
HResult.alias: Insufficient licensing, unable to obtain a Product Connection on the server (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_NO_BASE_KEY
HResult.alias: Insufficient licensing, unable to locate a Base Key on the server (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_RESTORED_KEY_SERVER
HResult.alias: Licensing on the License server has been restored (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_USE_FAILOVER_KEY_SERVER
HResult.alias: Unable to validate Licensing on the License server, switching to Failover License server (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_KEY_NO_REMOTE_VERSION_KEY_SERVER
HResult.alias: License Server is at a version that does not support remote connectivity. Please upgrade the License Server (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_PROD_NO_FREE_APP_INSTANCE
HResult.alias: Unable to obtain a Product Connection on the server for the given product (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_MOD_NO_FREE_APP_INSTANCE
HResult.alias: Unable to obtain a Product Connection on the server for the given module (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_KEY_ID
HResult.alias: Failed to validate software license with Protection Key ID (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_LICENSE_CODE
HResult.alias: Failed to validate software license with License Code (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_BIOS_SERIALNUMBER
HResult.alias: Failed to validate software license with Bios Serial Number (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_MAC_ADDRESS
HResult.alias: Failed to validate software license with MAC address (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_COMPUTER_NAME
HResult.alias: Failed to validate software license with Computer Name (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_CUSTOMER_COPY
HResult.alias: Can not validate against a Customer Copy (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_ARCHIVE
HResult.alias: Can not validate against a License Archive (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_PACKET
HResult.alias: Can not validate against a License Packet (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_CONNECT_FAILOVER_ONLY
HResult.alias: Failed to connect. This License Server is configured as a Failover License Server and can only be connected to as a failover (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_LIC_PACKET_ALREADY_ENTERED
HResult.alias: Failed to apply Software License Packet. This Packet has already been applied (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_CANT_GENERATE_LIC_PACKET
HResult.alias: License Server does not support generating License Packets (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_CANT_GENERATE_LIC_ARCHIVE_NO_KEY
HResult.alias: Can not generate License Archive that does not validate against a Protection Key (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_LIC_ARCHIVE_CODE_NO_MATCH
HResult.alias: Failed to apply License Archive. License Codes do not match, probably an trying to use an old License Archive (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_KEY_ID_REQUIRED
HResult.alias: Failed to update software license, appropriate Protection Key is required to be on the License Server for this action (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_LIC_FILE_EXPIRED
HResult.alias: Software License Expired (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_NO_PRODUCT
HResult.alias: Software Licensing does not contain licensing for the given product (License Server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT_NO_VERSION
HResult.alias: Software Licensing contains licensing for the given product, but not at the desired version (License Server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_MOD_NO_OBTAIN_USING_FAILOVER
HResult.alias: Unable to obtain module when using Backup Server (License Server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_CLOCK_LIC_PACKET
HResult.alias: The System Time does not seem to be set correctly (License Server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_CLOCK_LIC_ARCHIVE
HResult.alias: The System Time does not seem to be set correctly (License Server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_VALIDATION_FAILED_GENERIC
HResult.alias: Failed to validate software license with a Validation Token (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_SOFTWARE_LIC_PACKET_LIC_SERVER_UPGRADE
HResult.alias: Unable to use Software License Packet. The License Server has to be upgraded before this Software License Packet can be used (License server)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INVALID_FUNCTION_CODE
HResult.alias: Invalid function code (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INVALID_PACKET
HResult.alias: Invalid packet (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_UNIT_NOT_FOUND
HResult.alias: Unit not found (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_ACCESS_DENIED
HResult.alias: Access is denied (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INVALID_MEMORY_ADDRESS
HResult.alias: Invalid memory address (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INVALID_ACCESS_CODE
HResult.alias: Invalid access code (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_PORT_IS_BUSY
HResult.alias: Port is busy (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_WRITE_NOT_READY
HResult.alias: Write not ready (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_NO_PORT_FOUND
HResult.alias: No parallel ports found (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_ALREADY_ZERO
HResult.alias: Counter already zero (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_DRIVER_NOT_INSTALLED
HResult.alias: System device driver not installed or detected (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED
HResult.alias: System device driver is outdated, update the driver (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_QUERY_TOO_LONG
HResult.alias: Query to long (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_DRIVER_IS_BUSY
HResult.alias: System driver is busy (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_PORT_ALLOCATION_FAILURE
HResult.alias: Failure to allocate parallel port (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_PORT_RELEASE_FAILURE
HResult.alias: Failure to release previously allocated parallel port (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_ACQUIRE_PORT_TIMEOUT
HResult.alias: Failure to aquire access to parallel port with time-out period (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_SIGNAL_NOT_SUPPORTED
HResult.alias: Machine does not support a signal line (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INIT_NOT_CALLED
HResult.alias: Key is not initialized (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_FAIL_ON_DRIVER_COMM
HResult.alias: Client library failed on communication with the Rainbow system driver (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_SERVER_PROBABLY_NOT_UP
HResult.alias: The server is not responding, the client has timed out (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_UNKNOWN_HOST
HResult.alias: The server host is unknown; the server is not on the network or an invalid host name was specified (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_SENDTO_FAILED
HResult.alias: Unable to send a message to the server (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_SOCKET_CREATION_FAILED
HResult.alias: Unable able to open a network socket (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_NORESOURCES
HResult.alias: Insufficient resources (such as memory) to complete the request (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_BROADCAST_NOT_SUPPORTED
HResult.alias: Broadcast is not supported by the network interface on the system (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_BAD_SERVER_MESSAGE
HResult.alias: Could not understand a message received from the server (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_NO_SERVER_RUNNING
HResult.alias: Could not communicate with the server; verify the server is running (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_NO_NETWORK
HResult.alias: Unable to talk to the specified host; network communication problems encountered (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_NO_SERVER_RESPONSE
HResult.alias: No server responded to the client broadcast. There is no server running in the subnet (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_NO_LICENSE_AVAILABLE
HResult.alias: All licenses are currently in use (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INVALID_LICENSE
HResult.alias: License is no longer valid (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INVALID_OPERATION
HResult.alias: Specified operation cannot be performed (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL
HResult.alias: The size of the buffer is not sufficient to hold the expected data (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INTERNAL_ERROR
HResult.alias: An internal error (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_PACKET_ALREADY_INITIALIZED
HResult.alias: The packet being initialized was already initialized (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_SP_INVALID_STATUS
HResult.alias: An invalid status code was returned (Rainbow driver)

HResult.name: EHR_WRPPR_SVR_NOT_CONNECTED
HResult.alias: Not Connected (License Server Wrapper)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_MGR_NO_COMPUTER
HResult.alias: Could not communicate with the computer, verify computer name is correct (License Manager)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_MGR_NO_LIC_SERVER
HResult.alias: Unable to contact License Server on the computer, verify License Server is running and is at proper version (License Manager)

HResult.name: EHR_LIC_MGR_VIEW_ONLY
HResult.alias: Unable to perform the given action, initialized for view only (License Manager)
